summary: First testing iteration on KitchenNotes (Expo + FastAPI). Backend: 5/5 pytest passed (validation 422s, invalid Gemini key -> 400 with 'Gemini error', /api/ root 200). Happy-path /generate-quote SKIPPED (no real Gemini key available in test pool). Frontend: full setup -> printer-setup -> home -> preview flow verified on mobile viewport.

issues: Console warns: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); TouchableWithoutFeedback deprecated (use Pressable). Cosmetic only.

action_items: Happy-path /api/generate-quote with a real Gemini key was NOT executed — main agent or user must supply a valid key for full end-to-end verification of quote content, tone field, Mongo persistence, and /preview success state.
Optional: bump expo, expo-font, expo-router patch versions per Metro warning (54.0.35 / 14.0.12 / 6.0.24).
Optional cleanup: replace TouchableWithoutFeedback with Pressable and 'shadow*' style props with 'boxShadow' to silence RN web deprecations.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is used inside generate_quote handler (line 106) but defined later at line 147 — works because logger is referenced at call-time, but should be moved to top of file for clarity.
Mongo _id leak is correctly avoided by returning a Pydantic GenerateQuoteResponse (no _id field). Good.
Backend has no /api/health endpoint; only GET /api/ — acceptable for MVP.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of flows tested (preview success-state skipped without real key)

seed_data_creation: None. Backend test only writes to Mongo on real-key happy path which was skipped.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All testIDs verified working: setup-kitchen-input, setup-gemini-key-input, setup-save-button, setup-error, printer-list, printer-connect-DEMO-58-01, printer-chip, home-customer-input, order-increment/decrement (clamps at 1), order-number-value, generate-button, home-error, preview-tone, preview-order, preview-error. Simulated printer flow returns 3 demo devices as designed. To test happy path: supply real Gemini key, repeat /preview flow — preview-customer/preview-quote testIDs render only on success.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Preview shows verbose 'Gemini error: ...API key not valid' which is expected behaviour for an invalid key (passed through from backend HTTPException detail). Toast UX for this could be polished but is not a bug.
